caption: The video begins in a bright bedroom featuring a large bed with a reddish-brown wooden headboard, dressed in pink linens and decorative pillows. A matching wooden nightstand sits to the left of the bed, and an air conditioning unit is mounted high on the pale yellow wall. Long, light-colored curtains frame a large window, allowing soft light to fill the room. As the scene transitions, the perspective shifts from the interior bedroom to an outdoor balcony or terrace. This exterior area is paved with light-colored tiles and enclosed by a black metal railing. The balcony overlooks a residential neighborhood with several houses characterized by brown tiled roofs. A doorway with a white curtain and a small outdoor light fixture are visible on the wall of the house adjacent to the terrace. No people are present in any of the scenes.
